title: mentha × grata var. variegata
intro: Mentha × grata var. variegata, also known as the Variegated Peppermint, is a variety of peppermint plant characterized by its distinctive variegated leaves with white or cream-colored markings on a green background. The medicinal properties of Mentha × grata var. variegata lie in its high concentration of menthol and other essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate nausea, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Mentha × grata var. variegata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in aromatherapy and skincare products due to its refreshing and cooling properties.
